gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/290)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/290)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) مَا تَقُولُ فِي شُرْبِ الْفُقَّاعِ فَقَالَ خَمْرٌ مَجْهُولٌ يَا سُلَيْمَانُ فَلَا تَشْرَبْهُ أَمَا إِنَّهُ يَا سُلَيْمَانُ لَوْ كَانَ الْحُكْمُ لِي وَ الدَّارُ لِي لَجَلَدْتُ شَارِبَهُ وَ لَقَتَلْتُ بَائِعَهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya and someone else, from Muhammad Bin Ahmad, from Ahmad Bin Al Husayn, from Muhammad Bin Ismail, from Suleyman Bin Ja’far who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan Reza<sup>asws</sup>, ‘What are you<sup>asws</sup> saying regarding the fermented drink?’ So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘An unknown wine, O Suleyman, therefore do not drink it. But, O Suleyman, had the rule been mine<sup>asws</sup>, and the house were mine, I<sup>asws</sup> would whip its drinker and kill its seller’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya and others have narrated from Muhammad ibn Ahmad from Ahmad ibn al-Hassan from Muhammad ibn ’Isma‘il from Sulayman ibn Ja‘far who has said the following: “I once asked abu al-Hassan, al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about al-Fuqa ’. He (the Imam) said, ‘It is an unknown wine, O Sulayman and do not drink it. Had the command been in my hand and the house was my house, I would whip its drinker and execute its seller.’”
